member.name: M:GTA.World.CreatePropNoOffset(GTA.Model,GTA.Math.Vector3,System.Boolean)
member.summary:
Spawns a
of the given
at the specified position without any offset.
member.param:
The position to spawn the
at.

if set to
the
will have physics; otherwise, it will be static.
member.remarks:
returns
if the
could not be spawned.
